overallInterpretation: The artifact-aspect-ratio.txt shows vitest output with 7/7 tests passing across all three viewport modes (stretch, letterbox, truncate) plus a no-mismatch baseline case. This directly demonstrates the expected behavior: aspect ratio viewport calculations for stretch, letterbox, and truncate modes. The tests cover fills-entire-destination (stretch), bars top/bottom and left/right (letterbox), crops sides and top/bottom (truncate), and same-aspect-ratio identity. All passed in 311ms. Note: demo-readme.json lists 5 artifacts but only artifact-aspect-ratio.txt was in scope for this review; the other 4 artifacts were not evaluated.

artifacts.interpretation: Vitest run of view/aspect-ratio.test.ts: 7 tests passed, 0 failed. Covers stretch (fills entire destination), letterbox (bars top/bottom for wide-on-tall, bars left/right for square-on-wide, confirmed as default mode), truncate (crops sides for wide-on-tall, crops top/bottom for square-on-wide), and a baseline case where all modes produce a full viewport when aspect ratios match. This fully validates the demo expectation.
